testcase.name: test_dashboard_status_with_limit

failure.message: AssertionError: Should return at most 10 offers, got 80 assert 80 <= 10 + where 80 = len([{'market_sku': 4752797516, 'name': 'Фен для волос, для сушки и укладки FaKang FK-9900,', 'offer_id': '9900', 'price': 79000.0, ...}, {'market_sku': 4754494058, 'name': 'Сыворотка Axis-Y "Dark Spot Correcting", против пи', 'offer_id': 'Axis-y', 'price': 129000.0, ...}, {'market_sku': 4752966694, 'name': 'Набор "Чка Доян", для сужения влагалища, с интимны', 'offer_id': 'Chka', 'price': 99000.0, ...}, {'market_sku': 4754531772, 'name': 'Препарат для повышения потенции Super Black Ant Ki', 'offer_id': 'Chumoli', 'price': 69900.0, ...}, {'market_sku': 4752769286, 'name': 'Фен для сушки и для укладки волос + сумка в подаро', 'offer_id': 'Dyson Qora', 'price': 171000.0, ...}, {'market_sku': 5062057552, 'name': 'Парфюмерная вода "Formula Sexy", цветочно-сладкий ', 'offer_id': 'Formula Sexy3 Pushti', 'price': 59900.0, ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_yandex_dashboard_infographics.py:66: in test_dashboard_status_with_limit assert len(offers) <= 10, f"Should return at most 10 offers, got {len(offers)}" E AssertionError: Should return at most 10 offers, got 80 E assert 80 <= 10 E + where 80 = len([{'market_sku': 4752797516, 'name': 'Фен для волос, для сушки и укладки FaKang FK-9900,', 'offer_id': '9900', 'price': 79000.0, ...}, {'market_sku': 4754494058, 'name': 'Сыворотка Axis-Y "Dark Spot Correcting", против пи', 'offer_id': 'Axis-y', 'price': 129000.0, ...}, {'market_sku': 4752966694, 'name': 'Набор "Чка Доян", для сужения влагалища, с интимны', 'offer_id': 'Chka', 'price': 99000.0, ...}, {'market_sku': 4754531772, 'name': 'Препарат для повышения потенции Super Black Ant Ki', 'offer_id': 'Chumoli', 'price': 69900.0, ...}, {'market_sku': 4752769286, 'name': 'Фен для сушки и для укладки волос + сумка в подаро', 'offer_id': 'Dyson Qora', 'price': 171000.0, ...}, {'market_sku': 5062057552, 'name': 'Парфюмерная вода "Formula Sexy", цветочно-сладкий ', 'offer_id': 'Formula Sexy3 Pushti', 'price': 59900.0, ...}, ...])

testcase.name: test_generate_infographics_request_validation

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='vendorai.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=120)

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:534: in _make_request response = conn.getresponse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:571: in getresponse httplib_response = super().getresponse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/http/client.py:1395: in getresponse response.begin() /usr/local/lib/python3.11/http/client.py:325: in begin version, status, reason = self._read_status() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/http/client.py:286: in _read_status line = str(self.fp.readline(_MAXLINE + 1), "iso-8859-1") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/socket.py:718: in readinto return self._sock.recv_into(b) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/ssl.py:1314: in recv_into return self.read(nbytes, buffer) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/ssl.py:1166: in read return self._sslobj.read(len, buffer) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TimeoutError: The read operation timed out
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py:644: in send resp = conn.urlopen( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:841: in urlopen retries = retries.increment( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/retry.py:474: in increment raise reraise(type(error), error, _stacktrace) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/util.py:39: in reraise raise value /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:787: in urlopen response = self._make_request( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:536: in _make_request self._raise_timeout(err=e, url=url, timeout_value=read_timeout) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:367: in _raise_timeout raise ReadTimeoutError( E urllib3.exceptions.ReadTimeoutError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='vendorai.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=120)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_yandex_dashboard_infographics.py:254: in test_generate_infographics_request_validation response = requests.post( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:115: in post return request("post", url, data=data, json=json, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:59: in request return session.request(method=method, url=url, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:589: in request resp = self.send(prep, **send_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:703: in send r = adapter.send(request, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py:690: in send raise ReadTimeout(e, request=request) E requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='vendorai.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=120)

testcase.name: test_generate_infographics_max_count_limit

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='vendorai.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=120)

testcase.failure:

The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py:644: in send resp = conn.urlopen( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:841: in urlopen retries = retries.increment( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/retry.py:474: in increment raise reraise(type(error), error, _stacktrace) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/util.py:39: in reraise raise value /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:787: in urlopen response = self._make_request( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:536: in _make_request self._raise_timeout(err=e, url=url, timeout_value=read_timeout) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:367: in _raise_timeout raise ReadTimeoutError( E urllib3.exceptions.ReadTimeoutError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='vendorai.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. testcase.name: test_health_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_yandex_dashboard_infographics.py:302: in test_health_endpoint assert data.get("status") == "healthy" E AssertionError: assert 'ok' == 'healthy' E E - healthy E + ok
